title: Fix: Concurrency bug in cache
original_text: Fixed concurrency bug in cache implementation. Added proper locking for shared resources. Implemented thread-safe data structures. Added atomic operations for cache updates. Implemented concurrent access testing. Result: concurrency bug fixed.
expected_subject: fix(core): fix concurrency bug in cache
expected_body_lines: - Add proper locking for shared resources
- Add atomic operations for cache updates
expected_command: git commit -m "fix(core): fix concurrency bug in cache"
